<script id="bss-locator-script">
    var __BSS_MAP_LIB__;

    const lockMapLib = () => {
        if (window.L?.Map) __BSS_MAP_LIB__ = window.L;
        if (window.mapboxgl?.Map) __BSS_MAP_LIB__ = window.mapboxgl;
    };
    const waitForLeaflet = () => new Promise(resolve => {
        const check = () => window.L?.Map ? resolve() : setTimeout(check, 10);
        check();
    });
    const waitForMapbox = () => new Promise(resolve => {
        const check = () => window.mapboxgl?.Map ? resolve() : setTimeout(check, 10);
        check();
    });
    const waitForMarkerCluster = () => new Promise(resolve => {
        const check = () => {
            if (window.L && typeof window.L.MarkerClusterGroup === 'function') {
                resolve();
            } else {
                setTimeout(check, 10);
            }
        };

        check();
    });
    function bssLoadScript(src) {
        if (!src) return Promise.resolve();
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const s = document.createElement("script");
            s.src = src;
            s.className = 'bss-script';
            s.async = false;
            s.onload = () => {
                if (src.includes('leaflet.js')) {
                    waitForLeaflet().then(resolve);
                } else if (src.includes('mapbox-gl.js')) {
                    waitForMapbox().then(resolve);
                } else {
                    resolve();
                }
            };
            s.onerror = reject;
            document.head.appendChild(s);
        });
    }
    function runBSSLoader(scriptLocator) {
        const find = (key) => scriptLocator.find(src => src.includes(key));
        const scripts = {
            leaflet: find('leaflet.js'),
            mapbox: find('mapbox-gl.js'),
            mapboxSearch: find('mapbox-search.js'),
            markerCluster: find('leaflet.markercluster'),
            ggMarkerCluster: find('marker-clusterer.js'),
            autocomplete: find('autocomplete'),
            final: find('bss-sl.js')
        };

        const restoreMapLib = () => { 
            if (__BSS_MAP_LIB__) {
                if (BSS_SL.mapType == 1) window.L = __BSS_MAP_LIB__;
                if (BSS_SL.mapType == 2) window.mapboxgl = __BSS_MAP_LIB__;
            }
        };

        const step1 = (scripts.leaflet || scripts.mapbox)
            ? bssLoadScript(scripts.leaflet || scripts.mapbox).then(lockMapLib)
            : Promise.resolve();

        return step1.then(() => {
            restoreMapLib();
            let chain = Promise.resolve();

            if (scripts.markerCluster) {
                chain = chain.then(() => {
                    restoreMapLib();
                    return bssLoadScript(scripts.markerCluster);
                });
            }

            if (scripts.ggMarkerCluster) {
                chain = chain.then(() => {
                    return bssLoadScript(scripts.ggMarkerCluster);
                });
            }

            if (scripts.mapboxSearch) {
                chain = chain.then(() => {
                    return bssLoadScript(scripts.mapboxSearch);
                });
            }

            if (scripts.autocomplete) {
                chain = chain.then(() => {
                    return bssLoadScript(scripts.autocomplete);
                });
            }

            return chain;
        }).then(() => {
            restoreMapLib();
            if (scripts.markerCluster) {

            return waitForMarkerCluster()
                .then(() => {
                    restoreMapLib();
                    return bssLoadScript(scripts.final);
                });
            }
            return bssLoadScript(scripts.final);
        }).then(() => {
            console.log('%c 😎😍🤩 STORE LOCATOR 🤩😍😎 ',
                'font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,175,175,1) 17%, rgba(233,189,148,1) 74%); color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 5px; border-radius: 15px'
            );

            const el = document.querySelector('#store-locator-page');
            if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
        });
    }
    let scriptLocator = [
        "https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/bss-sl.js"
    ];
    if (BSS_SL.mapType == 1) {
        if (BSS_SL.zoomCountLocation == 0) {
            scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/leaflet.markercluster.js`);
        }
        scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/autocomplete.min.js`);
        scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/leaflet.js`);
    } else if (BSS_SL.mapType == 2) {
        scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/mapbox-gl.js`);
        scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/mapbox-search.js`);
    } else if (BSS_SL.zoomCountLocation == 0) {
        scriptLocator.unshift(`https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/marker-clusterer.js`);
    }
    runBSSLoader(scriptLocator);
</script><script src="https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019ef940-08eb-7279-b79c-cbea6e44ba5d/version_0e4caa86-2026-06-24_17h49m/assets/marker-clusterer.js" class="bss-script"></script>

  (function() {
    class VideoSlideshowayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh extends HTMLElement {
      constructor() {
        super();
        this.currentSlide = 0;
        this.players = [];
        this.isMuted = this.dataset.muted === 'true';
        this.isPlaying = this.dataset.autoplay === 'true';
        this.autoAdvance = this.dataset.autoAdvance === 'true';
        this.slideDuration = parseInt(this.dataset.slideDuration) * 1000;
        this.autoAdvanceTimer = null;
      }

      connectedCallback() {
        this.slides = this.querySelectorAll('.ai-video-slideshow-slide-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.prevBtn = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-nav-prev-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.nextBtn = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-nav-next-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.dots = this.querySelectorAll('.ai-video-slideshow-dot-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.muteBtn = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-mute-btn-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.playBtn = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-play-btn-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.mutedIcon = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-muted-icon-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.unmutedIcon = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-unmuted-icon-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.playIcon = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-play-icon-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        this.pauseIcon = this.querySelector('.ai-video-slideshow-pause-icon-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');

        if (this.slides.length === 0) return;

        this.loadYouTubeAPI();
        this.setupEventListeners();
        this.updateIcons();
      }

      loadYouTubeAPI() {
        if (window.YT && window.YT.Player) {
          this.initPlayers();
          return;
        }

        if (!window.onYouTubeIframeAPIReady) {
          const tag = document.createElement('script');
          tag.src = 'https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api';
          const firstScriptTag = document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
          firstScriptTag.parentNode.insertBefore(tag, firstScriptTag);

          window.onYouTubeIframeAPIReady = () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-autoplay]').forEach(el => {
              if (el.initPlayers) el.initPlayers();
            });
          };
        }

        this.initPlayers = this.initPlayers.bind(this);
      }

      initPlayers() {
        if (!window.YT || !window.YT.Player) return;

        const iframes = this.querySelectorAll('.ai-video-slideshow-iframe-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh');
        iframes.forEach((iframe, index) => {
          const player = new YT.Player(iframe, {
            events: {
              onReady: (event) => this.onPlayerReady(event, index),
              onStateChange: (event) => this.onPlayerStateChange(event, index)
            }
          });
          this.players.push(player);
        });
      }

      onPlayerReady(event, index) {
        if (this.isMuted) {
          event.target.mute();
        }
        if (index === 0 && this.autoAdvance) {
          this.startAutoAdvance();
        }
      }

      onPlayerStateChange(event, index) {
        if (index === this.currentSlide) {
          if (event.data === YT.PlayerState.PLAYING) {
            this.isPlaying = true;
          } else if (event.data === YT.PlayerState.PAUSED || event.data === YT.PlayerState.ENDED) {
            this.isPlaying = false;
            if (event.data === YT.PlayerState.ENDED && this.autoAdvance) {
              this.nextSlide();
            }
          }
          this.updateIcons();
        }
      }

      setupEventListeners() {
        if (this.prevBtn) {
          this.prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.prevSlide());
        }

        if (this.nextBtn) {
          this.nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.nextSlide());
        }

        this.dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
          dot.addEventListener('click', () => this.goToSlide(index));
        });

        if (this.muteBtn) {
          this.muteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.toggleMute());
        }

        if (this.playBtn) {
          this.playBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.togglePlay());
        }
      }

      prevSlide() {
        this.goToSlide(this.currentSlide === 0 ? this.slides.length - 1 : this.currentSlide - 1);
      }

      nextSlide() {
        this.goToSlide(this.currentSlide === this.slides.length - 1 ? 0 : this.currentSlide + 1);
      }

      goToSlide(index) {
        if (this.players[this.currentSlide]) {
          this.players[this.currentSlide].pauseVideo();
        }

        this.slides[this.currentSlide].classList.remove('active');
        this.dots[this.currentSlide]?.classList.remove('active');

        this.currentSlide = index;

        this.slides[this.currentSlide].classList.add('active');
        this.dots[this.currentSlide]?.classList.add('active');

        if (this.players[this.currentSlide] && this.isPlaying) {
          this.players[this.currentSlide].playVideo();
        }

        if (this.autoAdvance) {
          this.startAutoAdvance();
        }
      }

      toggleMute() {
        this.isMuted = !this.isMuted;
        this.players.forEach(player => {
          if (player) {
            if (this.isMuted) {
              player.mute();
            } else {
              player.unMute();
            }
          }
        });
        this.updateIcons();
      }

      togglePlay() {
        const currentPlayer = this.players[this.currentSlide];
        if (!currentPlayer) return;

        const state = currentPlayer.getPlayerState();
        if (state === YT.PlayerState.PLAYING) {
          currentPlayer.pauseVideo();
          this.stopAutoAdvance();
        } else {
          currentPlayer.playVideo();
          if (this.autoAdvance) {
            this.startAutoAdvance();
          }
        }
      }

      startAutoAdvance() {
        this.stopAutoAdvance();
        if (this.autoAdvance && this.slideDuration > 0) {
          this.autoAdvanceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
            this.nextSlide();
          }, this.slideDuration);
        }
      }

      stopAutoAdvance() {
        if (this.autoAdvanceTimer) {
          clearTimeout(this.autoAdvanceTimer);
          this.autoAdvanceTimer = null;
        }
      }

      updateIcons() {
        if (this.mutedIcon && this.unmutedIcon) {
          if (this.isMuted) {
            this.mutedIcon.style.display = 'block';
            this.unmutedIcon.style.display = 'none';
          } else {
            this.mutedIcon.style.display = 'none';
            this.unmutedIcon.style.display = 'block';
          }
        }

        if (this.playIcon && this.pauseIcon) {
          if (this.isPlaying) {
            this.playIcon.style.display = 'none';
            this.pauseIcon.style.display = 'block';
          } else {
            this.playIcon.style.display = 'block';
            this.pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';
          }
        }
      }

      disconnectedCallback() {
        this.stopAutoAdvance();
      }
    }

    customElements.define('video-slideshow-ayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh', VideoSlideshowayw9yefkroxvvthpoeaigenblock86d59daem3yhh);
  })();
</script>


</div>

    --section-padding-top: 20px;
    --section-padding-bottom: 20px;}

    </svg></div><div class="column__content"><p class="column__title heading font-medium leading-tight tracking-none">Easy &amp; Secure payment plans</p><div class="column__text rte"><p>Enjoy Convenience with Secure and Flexible payment plans</p></div></div>
        </div></carousel-element>
